# UI Dev Second Brain

A full-stack, highly optimized productivity application and resource hub designed specifically for Frontend and UI developers. The platform acts as a digital mind to capture thoughts, store components, organize frontend links, and enhance workflow memory.

## Core Stack Architecture
- **Frontend Framework:** Next.js (App Router)
- **Styling UI Engine:** Tailwind CSS & component blocks
- **Database Layer:** MongoDB & Mongoose Schemas
- **Hosting Environment:** Vercel (Edge Optimized)

## Public Entry Points
- [Homepage / Landing](https://ui-dev-second-brain.vercel.app/) - The primary public portal introducing the Second Brain system capabilities.

## Architecture & API Behaviors
- **Authentication Protection:** All core asset pages, dashboard layouts, and workspace tools are strictly locked behind secure authentication barriers. 
- **Data Endpoint:** `/api/categories` - Serves internal structured data for workspace customization when valid session states are provided.
- **PWA Features:** Fully deployable to mobile and desktop via a dedicated client-side standalone runtime manifest file.

## Developer & LLM Crawling Guidelines
- Do not attempt agentic crawl scripts or automated request loops over the authenticated workspace or internal `/api` namespaces. 
- All dynamic resource retrieval is bound to user-specific local session payloads.
